_comment: OPEN (non-secret) config for the prod environment. Secrets live in AWS Secrets Manager, not here: the whole DB connection (DB_HOST/DB_PORT/DB_NAME/DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD from the MiniBinders/database/* group), BINDGUI_SENDGRID_API_KEY, and BINDGUI_SSH_KEY_PASSPHRASE — all materialized at startup by fetch_secrets.py. Bootstrap-only vars read before the app starts (BINDGUI_ENV, BINDGUI_FETCH_SECRETS) stay as task-definition env vars. Reflects current prod: still on the mock backend until the RIS SSH path is wired — flip BINDGUI_BACKEND to ssh and set the SSH_* keys when ready.
